positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest scene, featuring monolithic, fractal-patterned trees growing around a stylized full moon and nebula burst. The aesthetic should blend vaporwave neon colors (deep indigo, magenta, electric teal) with classic linework and clean silhouettes. Composition must be perfectly balanced and central, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Use crisp, thick outlines (line art focus) against a gradient background that suggests cosmic dust and depth. Strong negative space contrast is essential. Studio lighting, graphic novel quality, symmetry, maximal contrast, vector illustration style.
negative: blurry, realistic, photo, artifacts, text, watermark, messy, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, signature, logos, trademarks
